message:
chore(beads): enrich issue descriptions and add test coverage issues

Bulk description-writing pass across the beads issue tracker:

- Write detailed descriptions for the entire bd-3w1.* family (21 storage
  pipeline sub-issues, bd-3w1.1 through bd-3w1.21) which previously had
  empty description fields — each now includes architecture, acceptance
  criteria, and implementation notes
- Add substantial descriptions to bd-2yj (2.7K chars) and bd-qtx (3.3K
  chars) which were also previously undocumented
- Add 3 new test-focused issues:
  - bd-2hz.17: Implement search history and bookmarks in fsfs TUI (P1)
  - bd-3un.51: Write unit/integration tests for model download and
    verification (P2)
  - bd-3w1.22: Write unit/integration tests for storage pipeline
    integration (P1)

No changes to priority, status, dependencies, or cross-references for
any existing issues. Net +3 issues (230 → 233 lines).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
